text: 1.4 Power System – Detailed Budget 6S Li-Ion Pack (Tattu 22000mAh) Parameter Value Cells 18650GA (6S6P – 36 cells total) Nominal Voltage 22.2V (3.7V per cell) Capacity 22,000mAh (488.4 Wh) Max Continuous Discharge 60A (2.7C) – safe for 10C cells Weight 2.3kg Energy Density 212 Wh/kg Power Budget (15W TDP mode) Component Voltage Current (mA) Power (W) Jetson Orin NX 5V (via PMIC) 3000 15.0 STM32H753 + sensors 3.3V 250 0.825 FLIR Boson 5V 240 1.2 Sony IMX477 2.8V 150 0.42 Microhard pDDL (Tx) 12V 2000 24.0 4x Motors (hover) 22.2V 8000 (total) 177.6 TOTAL Hover ~219W Flight time calculation: • Battery usable: 488.4 Wh x 0.8 (80% DoD) = 390.7 Wh • Hover power: 219W • Flight time: 390.7 / 219 = 1.78 hours (107 minutes) PMIC – TI LM51231 (Boost for Jetson) Parameter Value Input Range 3-45V (from battery) Output 5V @ 6A (regulated) Switching Frequency 2.2MHz (avoids AM radio interference) Efficiency 94% at 3A load Protection Overvoltage, overcurrent, thermal shutdown (160°C) 1.5 PCB Integration – Stackup & Shielding 6-Layer PCB Stackup (1.6mm total) Layer Function Copper Weight Dielectric 1 Signal (high-speed) 1 oz – 2 GND (solid) 1 oz 0.2mm FR4 3 Power (5V, 3.3V, 1.8V) 2 oz 0.4mm FR4 4 Signal (low-speed) 1 oz 0.4mm FR4 5 GND (solid) 1 oz 0.2mm FR4
